verses.ar: سلام على آل يس
verses.en: Peace be upon (the) progeny of Yaseen.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا داعي الله و رباني آياته
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the caller of Allah and place of manifestation of His signs.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا باب الله و ديان دينه
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the door of Allah and the devout one of His religion.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا خليفة الله و ناصر حقه
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the vicegerent of Allah and the helper of His truth.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا حجة الله و دليل إرادته
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the proof of Allah and the Guide of His intention.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا تالي كتاب الله و ترجمانه
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the reciter of Allah's book and its interpreter.

verses.ar: السلام عليك في آناء ليلك و أطراف نهارك
verses.en: Peace be upon you in your night and in your day.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا بقية الله في أرضه
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the remnant of Allah on His earth.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا ميثاق الله الذي أخذه و وكده
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the covenant of Allah, which He took it and He fastened it.

verses.ar: السلام عليك يا وعد الله الذي ضمنه
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the promise of Allah which He guaranteed it.

verses.ar: السلام عليك أيها العلم المنصوب
verses.en: Peace by upon you, O the manifested flag

verses.ar: و العلم المصبوب و الغوث
verses.en: and the one who is filled with knowledge and the help

verses.ar: و الرحمة الواسعة وَعْدٌ غَيْرُ مَكْذُوبٍ
verses.en: and the far-reaching mercy a promise which is not a lie.

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تقوم
verses.en: Peace be upon you while you are standing

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تقعد
verses.en: Peace be upon you while you are sitting.

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تقرأ و تبين
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you are reading and explaining

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تصلي و تقنت
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you are praying and supplicating.

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تركع و تسجد
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you are bowing and prostrating.

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تهلل و تكبر
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you are saying "There is no God except Allah' and (when) you are saying 'Allah is greater (than what He is described).'

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تحمد و تستغفر
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you are praising (Allah) and seeking forgiveness.

verses.ar: السلام عليك حين تصبح و تمسي
verses.en: Peace be upon you when you enter the morning and the evening.

verses.ar: السلام عليك في اللَّيْلِ إِذا يَغْشى
verses.en: Peace be upon you in the night when it envelops

verses.ar: وَ النَّهارِ إِذا تَجَلَّى
verses.en: and the day when it becomes manifest.

verses.ar: السلام عليك أيها الإمام المأمون
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the leader, the protected one.

verses.ar: السلام عليك أيها المقدم المأمول
verses.en: Peace be upon you, O the prior hoped one.

verses.ar: السلام عليك بجوامع السلام
verses.en: Peace be upon you by the collections of the salutations.

verses.ar: أشهد موالي أني أشهدك يا مولاي أني
verses.en: I call you as a witness, O my Master,

verses.ar: أشهد أن لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له
verses.en: I testify that there is no god except Allah, He is alone, there is no partner with Him.

verses.ar: و أن محمدا عبده و رسوله
verses.en: And indeed I testify that Mohammad is His servant and His Apostle;

verses.ar: لا حبيب إلا هو و أهله
verses.en: There is no beloved except him and his progeny.

verses.ar: و أشهدك أن أمير المؤمنين حجته
verses.en: And I call you as a witness, O my Master certainly Ali, the commander of the believers, is His proof.

verses.ar: و الحسن حجته و الحسين حجته
verses.en: And Hasan is His proof. And Husayn is His proof.

verses.ar: و علي بن الحسين حجته
verses.en: And Ali, son of Husayn is His proof.

verses.ar: و محمد بن علي حجته
verses.en: And Muhammad, son of Ali is His proof.

verses.ar: و جعفر بن محمد حجته
verses.en: And Ja'far, son of Mohammad is His proof.

verses.ar: و موسى بن جعفر حجته
verses.en: And Moosa, son of Ja'far is His proof.

verses.ar: و علي بن موسى حجته
verses.en: And Ali, son of Moosa is His proof.

verses.ar: و محمد بن علي حجته
verses.en: And Muhammad, son of Ali is His proof.

verses.ar: و علي بن محمد حجته
verses.en: And Ali, son of Mohammad is His proof.

verses.ar: و الحسن بن علي حجته
verses.en: And Hasan, son of Ali is His proof.

verses.ar: و أشهد أنك حجة الله
verses.en: And I testify that indeed you are the proof of Allah.

verses.ar: أنتم الأول و الآخر
verses.en: All of you, the first and the last.

verses.ar: و أن رجعتكم حق لا ريب
verses.en: And surely your return is a truth, there is no doubt in it.

verses.ar: فيها يوم لا يَنْفَعُ نَفْساً إِيمانُها لَمْ تَكُنْ آمَنَتْ مِنْ قَبْلُ
verses.en: The day when belief of none will benefit himself who previously

verses.ar: أَوْ كَسَبَتْ فِي إِيمانِها خَيْراً و أن الموت حق
verses.en: did notbelieve or acquired a goodness through his belief. And indeed death is a truth.

verses.ar: و أن ناكرا و نكيرا حق
verses.en: And indeed Naakir and Nakeer is a truth.

verses.ar: و أشهد أن النشر و البعث حق
verses.en: And I testify that indeed the scattering (stage of Qiyamat) is a truth and the raising is a truth.

verses.ar: و أن الصراط و المرصاد حق
verses.en: And indeed the bridge (over hell) is a truth and the watching place is a truth.

verses.ar: و الميزان و الحساب حق
verses.en: And the balance is a truth and the gathering is a truth

verses.ar: و الحساب حق و الجنة حق
verses.en: And the accounting (of deeds) is a truth and the Paradise

verses.ar: و النار حق و الوعد و الوعيد بهما حق
verses.en: and the hell is a truth. And the promise (of reward) and the threat (of the punishment) in them is a truth.

verses.ar: يا مولاي شقي من خالفكم و سعد من أطاعكم
verses.en: O my Master, one who opposes you is unlucky. And one who obeys you is lucky.

verses.ar: فاشهد على ما أشهدتك عليه
verses.en: And I am a friend for you, acquitted from your enemy.

verses.ar: و أنا ولي لك بري‏ء من عدوك
verses.en: Then testify whatever I made you a witness upon it.

verses.ar: فالحق ما رضيتموه و الباطل ما سخطتموه
verses.en: So the truth is whatever you are satisfied with. And the untrue is whatever you are angry with.

verses.ar: و المعروف ما أمرتم به و المنكر ما نهيتم عنه
verses.en: And the goodness is whatever you ordered. And the evil is whatever you have prohibited from.

verses.ar: فنفسي مؤمنة بالله وحده لا شريك له
verses.en: So lam abeliever in Allah, He alone, there is no partner with Him.

verses.ar: و برسوله و بأمير المؤمنين و بكم يا مولاي
verses.en: And (I am a believer) in His Apostle and in the commander of the believers. And in you O my Master,

verses.ar: أولكم و آخركم و نصرتي معدة لكم
verses.en: the first among you and the last among you. And my help is intended for you.

verses.ar: و مودتي خالصة لكم آمين آمين .
verses.en: And my love is purely for you. Amen! Amen ! (Accept! Accept!)
